content:
Sagittarius July 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Home and community — depth work early, then words carry the vision
Key Dates New Moon Jul 13 (Cancer, 8th house) / Mercury Rx ends Jul 23 / Full Moon Jul 29 (Aquarius, 3rd house)
Love 8th house New Moon is your most intimate fresh start of the year
Career 3rd house Full Moon brings a communication climax — say it publicly
Crystal of the Month Rose Quartz
Lucky Colors Deep purple, warm coral, soft rose
Lucky Number 3
Affirmation I let the depth open the words; the right message lands now.

This Month’s Energy

Sagittarius, July 2026 begins with depth, ends with voice. Mercury remains retrograde in Cancer (your 8th house of intimacy, shared finances, and psychological depth) until July 23, continuing the depth work June began. The New Moon in Cancer on July 13 also falls in your 8th house, doubling the intimacy emphasis. Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, clearing communications. The Buck Full Moon in Aquarius on July 29 lights up your 3rd house of communication, writing, and teaching — a climax around a message you’re ready to share. July’s job is to deepen intimacy early, then let the words carry the vision.

Key Dates for Sagittarius in July 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Sagittarius Do / Avoid
Jul 13 New Moon in Cancer 8th house — fresh start in intimacy, shared finances, psychological depth Do: name a deeper commitment, restructure joint finances, allow vulnerability
Avoid: using intensity to avoid real intimacy
Jul 23 Mercury turns direct Intimacy and shared-finance communications finally clear Do: send the proposal, sign the contract (carefully), make the joint decision
Avoid: expecting instant clarity — give it a few days
Jul 29 Full Moon in Aquarius (Buck Moon) 3rd house — communication, writing, teaching climax; a message or short trip peaks Do: publish the essay, launch the newsletter, send the message, book the trip
Avoid: gossip, sharp words you’ll regret
Jul 1–22 Mercury Rx continues (Cancer, 8th house) Intimacy and shared-finance conversations remain scrambled; old patterns surface Do: rest, journal on intimacy patterns, draft (don’t send) the important messages
Avoid: signing shared-finance agreements, important conversations before July 23
Jul 5 Venus enters Gemini 7th house Venus — partnership love, attraction, magnetism; an important relationship deepens Do: schedule the date night, name the relationship truth, allow softness
Avoid: testing the partner with intensity
Jul 22 Sun enters Leo 9th house season — belief, study, publishing, long journeys through August Do: read the challenging book, take the course, plan the trip
Avoid: defending a worldview you’ve outgrown

Career & Money

For Sagittarius, July’s first three weeks continue the shared-finance review. Mercury Rx in your 8th house means joint money, investments, debts, and business partnerships need honest attention. Use the early weeks to restructure, review, and prepare. Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, clearing the path.

The Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 falls in your 3rd house of communication, writing, and teaching — for Sagittarius, this is a climax around a message. An essay, a newsletter, a course, a teaching, a short trip — all favored. Combined with the Sun in Leo (fellow-fire, your 9th house) from July 22 and Jupiter still in Leo, the end of July supports publishing your wider view publicly. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is patient documentation through Mercury Rx, then bold action after July 23.

Love & Relationships

The New Moon in Cancer on July 13 falls in your 8th house of intimacy and psychological depth — your most private fresh start of the year. For coupled Sagittarians, this is the moment to name a deeper commitment or restructure joint finances. For singles, attraction runs toward depth now; surface flirtation feels hollow.

Venus entering Gemini on July 5 (your 7th house of partnership) supports partnership love and magnetism — an important relationship deepens. With Chiron now in your 6th house (since June 19), the deeper work continues: healing the work-and-routine patterns that block love. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is letting one trustworthy person see the depth.

Health & Wellness

July’s first three weeks favor inner work and rest. Mercury Rx in your 8th house can surface old grief, unprocessed loss, and emotional material. This is healing, not breakdown. Rest, journaling, and one trusted conversation are medicine now.

The Sun in Leo from July 22 (fellow-fire, your 9th house) returns warmth and vitality — Sagittarius thrives when the view widens, and a small trip or new study helps now. Rose Quartz, your crystal of the month, holds the heart steady through the depth-to-voice transition. Sagittarius rules the hips, liver, and thighs — walking, stretching, and moderate eating are medicine. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Rose Quartz

Why Rose Quartz fits Sagittarius this month. You are Jupiter-ruled, and July opens with 8th-house intimacy work (Mercury Rx + New Moon) and ends with a 3rd-house communication climax. Rose Quartz, traditionally tied to unconditional love, the heart chakra, and emotional harmony, is the stone that opens the heart so the depth can become words. Where Sunstone (June’s stone) kept your fire steady, Rose Quartz opens the heart for the intimacy and the message.

How to use it during July 2026. Place Rose Quartz over your heart for 10 minutes of breathing on July 13 (the 8th-house New Moon). Wear it as a pendant through the 3rd house Full Moon on July 29 — especially during any public message or teaching.

Best date to use it: July 13, the Cancer New Moon in your 8th house — Rose Quartz over your lower abdomen for 10 minutes of breathing, naming the depth you’re ready to share.

Read more: Rose Quartz Meaning and Best Crystals for Sagittarius.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Sagittarius — July 2026

When: July 13, the Cancer New Moon in your 8th house.
Crystal: Rose Quartz.
Intention: Open the depth; let the words carry the intimacy.

  1. Cleanse Rose Quartz under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of July 13.
  2. Set the intention on the 8th house theme: write down one vulnerability you’ve withheld from someone significant — and the conversation you’ll have before Mercury turns direct on July 23.
  3. Act by having the conversation (kindly, clearly) before July 23. Rose Quartz in your pocket during the talk.
  4. Reflect at the Aquarius Full Moon on July 29: what depth is ready to become a public message? Carry Rose Quartz while you publish or send it.

Shop Sagittarius Crystals for July 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Sagittarius crystal guide for stones connected with expansion, truth, optimism, and emotional balance — including the Rose Quartz that opens the heart during a depth-to-voice month. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Sagittarius July 2026

Is July 2026 a good month for Sagittarius?

Yes — the first three weeks favor intimacy and shared-finance work (8th house Mercury Rx + New Moon). Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, and the 3rd house Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 brings a communication climax.

How should Sagittarius handle Mercury Rx (in your 8th house, continuing from June) until July 23?

Intimacy and shared-finance conversations remain scrambled. Rest, journal on intimacy patterns, and avoid signing shared-finance agreements. The conversations unblock after July 23.

What does the Cancer New Moon on July 13 mean for Sagittarius?

It falls in your 8th house of intimacy, shared finances, and psychological depth — your most private fresh start of the year. Name a deeper commitment, restructure joint finances, allow vulnerability.

What is the best crystal for Sagittarius in July 2026?

Rose Quartz — it opens the heart so the depth can become words, perfectly matched to an 8th-house New Moon and a 3rd-house Full Moon. See the full Sagittarius crystal guide →

How will the Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 affect Sagittarius?

It falls in your 3rd house of communication, writing, and teaching — a climax around a message you’re ready to share. Publish the essay, launch the newsletter, book the trip.

Should Sagittarius publish a major piece in July 2026?

Wait until after July 23 if possible. Mercury Rx through the 23rd scrambles publishing communications. After July 23, the 3rd house Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 supports publishing.
